listings.title: TCL 43” Smart TV (Model 43S334) – Fully Working + Stand and remote Included
listings.body: Selling a TCL 43-inch Smart TV (Model 43S334) in excellent working condition. Everything functions perfectly with no major issues. * 43” TCL Smart TV (Roku TV platform) * Model: 43S334 * Fully tested and working * No scratches or dead pixels on screen * Includes original stand/legs and power cable * Original remote included (has a small crack but fully functional) * Smoke-free, pet-free home TV is about 4 years old (purchased around 2022). It was used infrequently from 2022–2024 and lightly used since then. Picture quality and performance are still solid. The only minor issue is the remote response is slightly slow at times, but it still works properly. Upgraded to a newer TV and no longer using this one. Pickup in New Rochelle, NY preferred. Will consider shipping only if buyer covers all shipping costs and arranges details. $130 OBO (or best offer)

listings.title: Winix D360 True-HEPA Air Purifier Air Cleaner (a set of TWO)
listings.body: *** For sale: A SET OF TWO (2) Winix D360 True-HEPA AIR PURIFIERS *** (Both in EXCELLENT condition) DESCRIPTION: The Winix D360 True-HEPA Air Putifier combines the best Air Cleaning technologies to capture the unseen particles and impurities suspended in the air, including dust, pollen, pet dander, smoke, organic chemicals (VOCs) and household odors. The D360 is the largest and most powerful air cleaner in the series and is designed for optimal use in large rooms. OVERVIEW OF 3-STAGE AIR CLEANING SYSTEM: 1. Mesh Pre-Filter that removes large particles such as hair, pollen and lint 2. Activated Carbon Filter absorbs odors and household VOCs 3. True HEPA Filter captures 99.97% of unseen particles down to 0.3 mic such as pet dander, smoke, and dust KEY FEATURES: • Auto Mode and Smart Sensor combine to deliver Set-and-Forget convenience • Control panel features 4 Fan Speeds for absolute control and a Sleep Mode, which dim the lights and sets the fan speed to quiet for an undisturbed sleep • ENERGY STAR Certified and AHAM verified(R) for 360 sq. ft. rooms KEY HIGHLIGHTS: • True-HEPA filtration captures 99.97% of particles (0.3 microns and larger) • Activated carbon filter is formulated to capture offensive smoke, cooking and other household odors, the disposable carbon sheet also works as a filter to capture large particles like hair, carpet fibers and dust • Washable pre-filter extends the life of your filter by capturing pet hair and larger airborne particles • Air quality visual indicator displays real-time air quality in the room with LED lights • Cleans rooms up to 1,740 sq ft in 1 hour (870 sq ft in 30 minutes, 580 sq ft in 20 minutes, 435 sq ft in 15 minutes). • Auto-mode utilizes smart sensors to automatically adjusts the fan speed to meet the needs of your environment • Light sensor - automatically puts unit on quiet fan speed and dims indicator lights once room lights are turned off

listings.title: Cast Iron Grater
listings.body: Made in Italy. 100% working order. Commercial, powerful grater. Used for hard cheese and stale bread. Includes an additional grating wheel. Wood handle snapped off and missing.
